title: Would it be possible to integrate the all the files of an Item’s and Subitem’s files column in the Files View?
excerpt: We use the files columns for invoices and purchase orders and it would be helpful to be able to see all the files in an Item and it’s Subitems in the Files View.

posts.author: DHLewis (Daniel Herndon-Lewis )
posts.cookedHtml: We use the files columns for invoices and purchase orders and it would be helpful to be able to see all the files in an Item and it’s Subitems in the Files View.
